tick_delta_vs_1400.summary: First non-zero-delta tick of the afternoon — BANDHANBNK transitioned OPEN→FILLED. Cash 503,275 → 453,275. Holdings 8 → 9. OPEN orders 2 → 1 (GLENMARK only). All movement is mechanical (passive fill); zero new strategy decisions.

findings: Mechanical fill tick: BANDHANBNK 250 @ ₹200 filled in the 14:00→14:30 window, completing the 12:44 strategy submission. No new BUY/SELL/MODIFY decisions from the strategy layer this tick.

Strategy-decision silence now 1h46m post-BANDHANBNK BUY (12:44:19) — at the 14:00 'flag if extends past 14:30 / 1h46m+' observability threshold. Behavioral observation only; no numeric lever attaches.
Cash buffer healthy at 45.53% of capital (₹453,275). Filled deployment 54.47% / full-fill projection 59.29% — comfortable 5.71 pp buffer to 65% cap.

No single-name concentration breach: largest filled position NESTLEIND at 12.06% of capital, 2.94 pp buffer to 15% max_position_pct cap. BANDHANBNK's fill at 5.02% is the smallest filled position by capital.

No sector concentration breach: BFSI now 12.93% (PNBHOUSING 7.91% + BANDHANBNK 5.02%, fully realized post-fill), still 9.07 pp buffer to 22% cap. FMCG 12.06%, Pharma 10.05% on full GLENMARK fill, Power 9.91%, Mining/Metals 9.32%, Gold 5.03%. All 6 sectors comfortably under cap.
Daily realized P&L = ₹0 (1 BUY filled today, 1 still OPEN; 0 SELLs). No risk of daily_loss_limit_pct circuit breaker firing.

GLENMARK OPEN order is now 5h19m old (submitted 09:10:58 at ₹2400 limit) — observability flag continues. Stale-order ageing is monotonically extending tick-over-tick. If still OPEN at EOD, log into Day-7 review as a stale-order observation.

Tighten max_deployed_pct (0.65 → 0.60): NOT FIRED. Full-fill projection 59.29% (essentially flat vs 14:00 59.30% — BANDHANBNK fill simply realized a previously-projected commitment). Pre-fire trigger 'full-fill > 62%' has 2.71 pp residual.

Tighten max_sector_pct (0.22 → 0.20): NOT FIRED. Largest sector BFSI 12.93% (now fully realized via BANDHANBNK fill, not just projected). 4.07 pp pre-fire buffer to 17% trigger threshold. No new sector additions in window.
Tighten min_confidence (0.65 → 0.68): NOT FIRED. No new entries to gate; closed-trade sample (n=8: 3W/5L) unchanged.
Tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12): NOT FIRED. NESTLEIND 12.06% largest, 2.94 pp buffer; no holdings movement on the size axis.

Tighten max_sl_pct (0.04 → 0.035): NOT FIRED. The 13:00/13:30/14:00 trigger ('3rd ceiling-hugging entry this session → fire') did not fire — no new entries at all in the 14:00→14:30 window. BANDHANBNK was a fill of an already-admitted order (sl_pct already locked at submission). Lever remains ARMED for the rest of the session.

Note on discipline: this is a mechanical-fill tick, not a strategy-decision tick. Firing any lever on a passive broker match would conflate fill mechanics with admission-quality signals — and admission quality is exactly what the override stack governs. The Day-1→Day-6 stack (min_confidence 0.65, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.65, max_sector_pct 0.22, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04, daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04) is biting on the admission surface; a fill that realizes a pre-admitted commitment carries no fresh signal. Holding fire is the disciplined response.

daily_loss_limit_pct 0.04 → 0.03 — fires if daily realized P&L worsens past -₹15K (currently ₹0).
min_confidence 0.65 → 0.68 — re-evaluate at EOD if a 3rd entry today arrives at the 0.65 floor (mirroring the boundary-hugging pattern of GLENMARK at 0.65 and BANDHANBNK at 0.68).

Strategy-silence watch — silence now 1h46m post-BANDHANBNK BUY decision; if it extends past 15:30 (i.e., 2h46m+ of strategy-decision silence with the close approaching), elevate to behavioral concern in the next risk_monitor tick (still not a numeric lever — informs Day-7 EOD review of strategy cadence into close).

rationale: Mechanical-fill tick (BANDHANBNK 12:44 OPEN → FILLED in the 14:00-14:30 window) with no new strategy decisions. Book composition realized exactly as projected at 14:00 — full-fill deployment essentially flat at 59.29% (was 59.30%), sector mix unchanged, single-name distribution unchanged. The Day-1→Day-6 override stack continues to bite on the admission surface (today's 2 entries cleared the 0.65 confidence floor, 0.04 SL ceiling, 0.15 per-name cap, 0.22 sector cap, 0.65 deployment cap), and no fresh trigger fired this tick. Risk_monitor's discipline at 14:30 mirrors 14:00: don't fire decoratively when the book carries no active risk vector and no spec-armed trigger has cleared. Strategy-decision silence (1h46m post-BANDHANBNK) hits the 14:00-armed observability threshold but remains an observation, not a lever. Levers re-armed for the rest of the session as listed. No changelog entry written because no parameter was changed.
